subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O Nightingale, for the Most Great Ocean hath turned toward thee from this Spot with waves of wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک یا عندلیب بما اقبل الیک البحر الاعظم منهذا المکان بامواج الحکمه و
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the power of words; of speech
